description: Hand-labeled evaluation set for ablation study. Relevance tiers 0-5 based on the JD requirements for Senior AI Engineer at Redrob.

tier_definitions.5: Ideal candidate: strong AI/ML engineer at product company, 5-9 yrs, relevant skills, good behavioral signals
tier_definitions.4: Strong candidate: good AI/ML background, minor gaps (location, exact experience range)
tier_definitions.3: Relevant candidate: has AI/ML exposure but significant gaps (consulting-only, limited production experience)
tier_definitions.2: Marginal: some tech background but wrong domain (e.g., data engineering without ML, or CV-only)
tier_definitions.1: Weak: non-technical role but has some transferable skills or AI curiosity
tier_definitions.0: Irrelevant / trap: non-technical title with keyword-stuffed skills, or honeypot

notes: Labels assigned based on: (1) current title relevance, (2) career history in product vs consulting, (3) AI/ML skill depth vs keyword stuffing, (4) experience range alignment, (5) behavioral signals. Higher tiers require BOTH strong qualifications AND good behavioral signals.
